---
title: Brand test
format: touying-typst
theme: clean
author:
  - name: Ada Lovelace
date: today
brand:
  color:
    primary: "#1f6feb"
    secondary: "#cf222e"
    foreground: "#1b1f24"
---

# Section

## Heading

Body text with [an alert in secondary]{.alert}.

- A bullet (marker uses primary)
